{{Quote|I watched him take down a squad of Imperial commandos with nothing more than the butt of an empty blaster rifle.|Jabiimi soldier|<ref name="Empire 30">[[Empire 30|''Empire'' 30]]</ref>}}
'''Luscen''' was a [[Jabiimi]] jailor during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Placed in charge of guarding [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Nera Dantels]] and [[Jorin Sol]] (who had been captured by the Jabiimi rebels), he was killed during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack against the [[Jabiimi Loyalists]]' [[Loyalist headquarters|headquarters]].
